pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and verifier.py confirm this is the target path.
Task description, setup_task.sh, and verifier.py confirm this is the target path.
Task description and verifier.py require at least 5 rows in the CSV.
Task description and verifier.py require 'ref_size' and 'start_size' columns.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/size_matching.psyexp and a conditions CSV file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/size_conditions.csv. The conditions file must contain at least 5 rows and include the columns 'ref_size' and 'start_size'.
